sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51930" key="kaqupo/keimai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καθυπό-κειμαι</orth>, strengthd. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑπόκ-</foreign>, <sense id="n51930.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be 'in being', 'in evidence</tr_>', <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
